steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
Similar triangles have the same scale factor for corresponding side lengths as for perimeters:
$$\frac{160}{40}=4$$

steps.title: Scale the corresponding side
steps.content:
Since side $TU$ corresponds to side $XY$, multiply the length of side $TU$ by the scale factor:
$$8(4)=32$$

steps.title: Select the matching choice
steps.content: The corresponding side in triangle $XYZ$ has length $32$. The answer is C.
